scripts.migration:generate: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.typeorm.json npx typeorm-ts-node-commonjs migration:generate libs/database/migrations/migration -d libs/database/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:run: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.typeorm.json npx typeorm-ts-node-commonjs migration:run -d libs/database/data-source.ts
scripts.migration:revert: cross-env TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.typeorm.json npx typeorm-ts-node-commonjs migration:revert -d libs/database/data-source.ts
